title: Trypsin catalytic triad, side chains and focus
prompt: Load trypsin (3PTB) as a cartoon, colour the catalytic triad (His57, Asp102 and Ser195 on chain A) magenta with their side chains shown, and centre the camera on them.
notes: Domain fact: the serine-protease catalytic triad is His57/Asp102/Ser195. Tests a multi-residue selection with side chains and a camera focus on the same set.
